# Quality control {#sec-qc}

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)
targets::tar_source()
targets::tar_load(qc_figures)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())
qc <- qc_figures

fmt_n <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, function(v) {
    if (is.infinite(v)) return("Inf")
    if (abs(v - round(v)) < 1e-9) {
      return(format(as.integer(round(v)), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE))
    }
    format(round(v, 3), nsmall = 3, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
  }, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}
fmt_range <- function(lo, hi) paste0(fmt_n(lo), "-", fmt_n(hi))
wrap_lab <- function(x, width = 18L) {
  vapply(strwrap(x, width = width, simplify = FALSE), paste, collapse = "\n", FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}
metric_lab <- function(x) {
  c(nCount_RNA = "UMIs", nFeature_RNA = "detected genes", percent_mt = "mitochondrial %",
    percent_ribo = "ribosomal %", percent_malat1 = "MALAT1 %",
    percent_contam = "contamination %")[x]
}
sample_key_row <- qc$modality_table$modality == "proteomics sample key"
metric_names <- metric_lab(qc$metric_bounds$metric)
stopifnot(
  is.list(qc),
  all(c("modality_table", "geomx_genotype", "genotype_batch", "depth_distribution",
        "fraction_distribution", "metric_bounds", "audit_notes") %in% names(qc)),
  nrow(qc$modality_table) == 5L,
  sum(sample_key_row) == 1L,
  !anyNA(metric_names),
  nrow(qc$geomx_genotype) == 4L,
  nrow(qc$genotype_batch) == 16L,
  length(unique(qc$genotype_batch$batch)) == 4L,
  all(qc$genotype_batch$Freq > 0),
  sum(qc$geomx_genotype$n_aoi) == 91L,
  qc$modality_table$n_samples[sample_key_row] == 16L,
  all(qc$metric_bounds$within),
  all(qc$metric_bounds$n_na == 0L)
)
```

## Modalities loaded

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-modality-grid
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 5.4
#| fig-cap: "Assay dimensions, GeoMx AOI counts and the 16-run sample key are materialised."
#| fig-alt: "Loaded assay dimensions and GeoMx AOI counts by genotype."
modal <- qc$modality_table
modal$modality <- factor(modal$modality, levels = rev(modal$modality))
modal_cells <- rbind(
  data.frame(modality = modal$modality, axis = "feature axis",
             label = paste(fmt_n(modal$n_features), modal$feature_axis),
             n = modal$n_features, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(modality = modal$modality, axis = "sample axis",
             label = paste(fmt_n(modal$n_samples), modal$sample_axis),
             n = modal$n_samples, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
)
modal_cells$axis <- factor(modal_cells$axis, levels = c("feature axis", "sample axis"))

geomx_counts <- qc$geomx_genotype
geomx_counts$genotype <- factor(geomx_counts$genotype, levels = genotype_levels)

p_modal <- ggplot(modal_cells, aes(axis, modality, fill = log10(pmax(n, 1)))) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3.2, lineheight = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_rwb(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Materialised target dimensions")

p_geomx <- ggplot(geomx_counts, aes(genotype, n_aoi, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = fmt_n(n_aoi)), vjust = -0.35, size = 3.1) +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AOIs", title = "GeoMx genotype tally") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, max(geomx_counts$n_aoi) * 1.18)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

p_modal / p_geomx + plot_layout(heights = c(2.4, 1))
```

## snRNAseq microglia: design balance

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-genotype-batch
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-cap: "All sixteen genotype-by-batch microglia cells are populated."
#| fig-alt: "Heatmap of nuclei counts for all four genotypes across all four batches."
cell_counts <- qc$genotype_batch
cell_counts$genotype <- factor(as.character(cell_counts$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
cell_counts$batch <- factor(cell_counts$batch, levels = sort(unique(cell_counts$batch), method = "radix"))
ggplot(cell_counts, aes(batch, genotype, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = fmt_n(Freq)), size = 3.2) +
  scale_fill_rwb(name = "nuclei") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Microglia genotype-by-batch design grid")
```

## snRNAseq microglia: quality metrics

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-depth
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "Total counts and detected genes stay finite across genotypes."
#| fig-alt: "Binned log10 total-count and detected-gene distributions by genotype."
depth_bins <- qc$depth_distribution
depth_bins$genotype <- factor(as.character(depth_bins$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
depth_bins$metric <- factor(depth_bins$metric, levels = c("total counts", "detected genes"))
depth_width <- median(diff(sort(unique(depth_bins$x_mid))))
ggplot(depth_bins, aes(x_mid, n, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_col(width = depth_width * 0.92) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "log10 count", y = "nuclei", title = "Library size and complexity")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-fractions
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-cap: "Mitochondrial, ribosomal, MALAT1 and contamination fractions remain bounded."
#| fig-alt: "Binned percentage-quality distributions by genotype."
frac_bins <- qc$fraction_distribution
frac_bins$genotype <- factor(as.character(frac_bins$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
frac_bins$metric <- factor(frac_bins$metric, levels = c("mitochondrial %", "ribosomal %",
                                                        "MALAT1 %", "contamination %"))
frac_width <- median(diff(sort(unique(frac_bins$x_mid))))
ggplot(frac_bins, aes(x_mid, n, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_col(width = frac_width * 0.92) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "% of nucleus counts", y = "nuclei", title = "Quality fractions")
```

## Sanity bounds (enforced)

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-bounds-status
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 5.2
#| fig-cap: "Definitional metric rails and structural QC checks pass."
#| fig-alt: "Status tiles show passing modality, design and metric-bound checks."
bounds <- qc$metric_bounds
bounds$metric_label <- unname(metric_lab(bounds$metric))
bounds$observed <- fmt_range(bounds$obs_min, bounds$obs_max)
bounds$status <- ifelse(bounds$within, "PASS", "FAIL")
bounds_cells <- rbind(
  data.frame(item = bounds$metric_label, field = "observed range",
             label = bounds$observed, status = bounds$status, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(item = bounds$metric_label, field = "rail",
             label = wrap_lab(bounds$rail, 20L), status = bounds$status, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(item = bounds$metric_label, field = "status",
             label = bounds$status, status = bounds$status, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
)
bounds_cells$item <- factor(bounds_cells$item, levels = rev(bounds$metric_label))
bounds_cells$field <- factor(bounds_cells$field, levels = c("observed range", "rail", "status"))

audit <- qc$audit_notes
audit$item <- wrap_lab(audit$note, 18L)
audit$status <- toupper(audit$status)
audit$item <- factor(audit$item, levels = rev(audit$item))

p_bounds <- ggplot(bounds_cells, aes(field, item, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 2.9, lineheight = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_discrete(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Metric bounds")

p_audit <- ggplot(audit, aes("status", item, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = status), size = 3.2) +
  scale_fill_discrete(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Structural checks")

p_audit | p_bounds
```
